description: Export a set of 2D SVG vector drawings of the eCRM-001 configuration from the Top, Front, and Side orthographic views. The OpenVSP application is already open with the eCRM-001 model loaded. You must: 1. Change the viewport camera to the Top view (using the View menu or controls) and export the drawing as an SVG to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_top.svg' using File > Export. 2. Change the camera to the Front view and export it to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_front.svg'. 3. Change the camera to either Side view (Left or Right) and export it to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_side.svg'. All three files must be valid SVG files showing different perspectives.
